claim: Paige Ostroushko was arrested for assaulting reporter Savanah Hernandez during an anti-ICE protest, with videos showing the incident and charges to be filed.

sub_questions.question: Who is Paige Ostroushko and what was she accused of?
What exactly happened to Savanah Hernandez during an anti-ICE protest?
When and where did this incident occur?
Were charges filed against Paige Ostroushko related to this incident? If so, what were they?
Are there videos of the incident?
